verses.1: A Song of Ascents. When the LORD brought back the captives of Zion, We were like those who dream.
verses.2: Then our mouth was filled with laughter And our tongue with joyful shouting; Then they said among the nations, “The LORD has done great things for them.”
verses.3: The LORD has done great things for us; We are joyful.
verses.4: Restore our fortunes, LORD, As the streams in the South.
verses.5: Those who sow in tears shall harvest with joyful shouting.
verses.6: One who goes here and there weeping, carrying his bag of seed, Shall indeed come again with a shout of joy, bringing his sheaves with him.
